title: coffea dewevrei var. neoarnoldiana
intro: Coffea dewevrei var. neoarnoldiana, also known as Neo-Arnoldiana, is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Coffea dewevrei plant, a species of coffee plant native to the highlands of Madagascar. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential to prevent and treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and malaria, due to its high content of xanthines and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Coffea dewevrei var. neoarnoldiana include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine in Madagascar and other parts of the world.
